_bundleStrategy: 22% off sum-of-three. Saving shown as explicit dollar amount, not %. Set listed as separate Etsy listing in addition to Mix & Match cross-link on individuals.
_crossLinkCopyForIndividualListings: Part of the {{SeriesName}} series. Save ${{Savings}} with the curated set of three — see "{{SetName}}" in our shop. Designed to balance as a gallery wall or stand alone.

sets.name: Sumi-e Essentials
sets.title: Sumi-e Print Set of 3, Japandi Wall Art Gallery Wall, Japanese Ink Triptych, Above-Bed Decor | Sumi-e Essentials by Calm & Oak
sets.description:
Sumi-e print set of 3 — minimalist Japanese ink gallery wall on museum-quality 250gsm matte paper. Enso, Mountain Mist, and Crane. A calm Japandi triptych for bedroom, meditation space, or above-bed wall.

*Sumi-e Essentials* — The three quietest pieces in the Sumi-e series — the brushstroke, the mountain, the bird. Each drawn in a single breath; together, a complete meditation wall.

A curated triptych from our **Sumi-e** series — three prints designed to balance as a single gallery wall. Available individually here: *Enso*, *Mountain Mist*, *Crane*.

**Set sizes — all fit standard frames**
• Three 8×10 in — $66 (save $18 vs individuals)
• Three 11×14 in — $98 (save $28)
• Three 16×20 in — $158 (save $46)

**Materials**
• Museum-quality matte fine-art posters, 250 gsm each
• Acid-free, FSC-certified archival paper
• Warm off-white background — not bright white
• Original Calm & Oak artwork, drawn in-house

**Made to order.** Each print is produced separately and shipped together flat. Allow 3–5 business days before dispatch. Unframed — frame separately for the cleanest look.

A quiet gift for meditation studios, yoga teachers, anniversary gifts (the crane is the Japanese marriage symbol), Japandi bedrooms, and above-bed decor.

Japandi wall art set • sumi-e ink triptych • Japanese ink gallery wall • zen wall art set • wabi-sabi decor • meditation art • above bed gallery wall

sets.name: Japanese Calligraphy Triptych
sets.title: Japanese Kanji Print Set of 3, Calligraphy Triptych, Shizuka Wa Ma Wall Art, Zen Decor | Japanese Calligraphy Triptych by Calm & Oak
sets.description:
Japanese calligraphy print set of 3 — Shizuka, Wa, Ma on museum-quality 250gsm matte paper. A quiet zen triptych for meditation studio, designer office, or above-bed wall.

*Japanese Calligraphy Triptych* — Shizuka 静 — stillness. Wa 和 — harmony. Ma 間 — the space between. The three Japanese characters that translate the Japandi premise directly.

A curated triptych from our **Japanese Calligraphy** series — three prints designed to balance as a single gallery wall. Available individually here: *Shizuka*, *Wa*, *Ma*.
